metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for Estonian digital services. Banking, tax, business registry, and more.

plugins.name: lhv
plugins.description: LHV Bank CLI skill. Authenticate with Smart-ID, view accounts and transactions, switch between personal and business profiles, and make SEPA payments.

plugins.name: emta
plugins.description: EMTA (Estonian Tax and Customs Board) CLI skill. Authenticate via Smart-ID, list and view TSD declarations.
